category_sources: Official OMake page describes OMake as a scalable and portable build system: https://projects.camlcity.org/projects/omake.html
source_facts.description says it is a build system designed for scalability, portability, and concision.
display_name_sources: Official project page title and heading use OMake: https://projects.camlcity.org/projects/omake.html
docs_sources: Homepage is the official Camlcity OMake project page.
Official OMake page links to The OMake user guide and reference manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/ocaml-omake/omake; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official OMake page says it supports C, C++, OCaml, LaTeX, and scriptable build automation.
